meta.title: Northrop's new F/A-XX render looks A LOT like a new YF-23!
meta.description:
Northrop Grumman just released a render of it’s F/A-XX fighter design and, holy crap, does it look a lot like a 6th-generation version of the now-legendary YF-23.
